name: chr21_21p_acrocentric_short_arm_NOR
description: 21p acrocentric short arm carrying one of five nucleolar organizer regions (NORs) with ~300-400 tandem rDNA 45S repeats (~43 kb each) and distal/proximal junction SD blocks shared homologously with chr13p, 14p, 15p, 22p. Robertsonian translocation hotspot; trisomy-21 origin via 14;21 / 21;21 rob fusion is well documented.

architecture.internal_structure: Distal satellite (BSAT, ACRO), rDNA array (~300 copies of 43 kb 45S unit), proximal junction SDs shared with other acrocentric short arms (interchromosomal SDs at 99.5% identity).
